title: Sign in and reach the authenticated workspace
description: A signed-in user can complete login and land in the authenticated workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed
